prose:
**Aniline Frontier-Orbital Analysis** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact integrals, no density fitting), PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied aniline.xyz, single-point (not relaxed). SCF converged in 9 cycles. HOMO = −5.554 eV (orbital index 24, occupation 2.0). LUMO = −0.249 eV (orbital index 25, occupation 0.0). **HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.305 eV** (Koopmans-type orbital gap, not an excitation energy). Structure: 14 atoms (C₆H₅NH₂). All orbital energies shown at frontier (3 occupied, 3 virtual). Koopmans descriptors derived: vertical IP = 5.554 eV, vertical EA = 0.249 eV, electronegativity = 2.901 eV, chemical hardness = 2.652 eV, electrophilicity index = 1.587 eV. Command: `chemkit frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`. No warnings. Integrity trustworthy.</prose>
<parameter name="integrity_trustworthy">true
